transcript: Speaker A: चल मी तुला एक chance देते. हे sentences आधी English मध्ये बोल. तू खूप सुंदर आहेस. [Come on, I'll give you a chance. Speak these sentences in English first. You are very beautiful.] Speaker B: You are very beautiful. Speaker A: तू जगातला सगळ्यात चांगला judge आहेस. [You are the best judge in the world.] Speaker B: You're the best judge in the world. Speaker A: मी तुझा खूप मोठा fan आहे. [I am a very big fan of yours.] Speaker B: I'm a very big fan of yours. Speaker A: तुझं English खूप छान आहे. [Your English is very good.] Speaker B: Your English is really good. Speaker A: OK थांब थांब. इतकं छान English बोलायला कुठून शिकलास? [OK stop, stop. Where did you learn to speak such good English?] Speaker B: Where did you learn to speak such good English? Speaker C: अरे सांग ना कुठून शिकलास English? मलाही शिकायचं आहे. [Hey tell us, where did you learn English? I also want to learn.] Speaker B: एक app आहे जे मला मराठीतून English शिकवतं. [There is an app that teaches me English from Marathi.] Speaker C: कोणता app आहे? नाव सांग ना. [Which app is it? Tell us the name.] Speaker B: MySivi app मध्ये एक AI teacher आहे ज्याच्यासोबत तुम्ही मराठीत बोलू शकता आणि English शिकू शकता. App वर मी रोज फक्त १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस करायचो आणि २-३ आठवड्यांतच मी कॉन्फिडेंटली English बोलायला लागलो. त्यामुळे जर तुम्हालाही कॉन्फिडेंट English बोलायचं असेल तर आजच MySivi app डाऊनलोड करा आणि फक्त १ रुपयाच्या ट्रायलमध्ये English बोलायला सुरुवात करा. [In the MySivi app, there is an AI teacher with whom you can speak in Marathi and learn English. On the app, I used to practice for just 15 minutes daily, and in just 2-3 weeks, I started speaking English confidently. So if you also want to speak confident English, download the MySivi app today and start speaking English in just a 1 rupee trial.]

Install 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1
summary: A talent show contestant impresses judges by instantly translating Marathi sentences into fluent English. He credits his skills to the MySivi app's AI teacher, which allows users to practice English from Marathi. The ad concludes with a call to download the app and start a 3-day premium trial for just 1 rupee.
